summary: Comprehensive testing of Italian Painting Quote Management application completed. Both backend APIs and frontend functionality extensively tested with excellent results.

minor_bugs.issue: API expects 'adjustment' as query parameter instead of request body
minor_bugs.impact: Stock adjustment functionality not working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks
ui_bugs.impact: User may need to press Escape or close modal before navigating

working_features: Client management with comprehensive form fields
Quote builder with line items and automatic calculations
Employee management with worklogs and payments
PDF generation and download for quotes

design_observations.details: Clean, modern interface with proper Italian translations and business terminology
Automatic calculations working correctly (tested €1525.00 total with VAT)
Proper validation and error handling on forms

passed_tests: Client CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Quote creation with line items and calculations

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major flows working with minor modal overlay issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update /api/materials/{id}/adjust-stock endpoint to accept 'adjustment' parameter in request body instead of query parameters for better API consistency. Consider adding z-index or focus management for modal overlays to prevent navigation blocking.
